title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Canara Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Canara Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!
